name: Shot-Stopping (Goals Prevented)
formula: Σ PSxG (on-target shots faced) − goals conceded, per 90.

name: Save Difficulty-Weighted Stopping
formula: Σ xGOT of shots actually saved (harder saves count for more), per 90.

name: Big-Chance / High-Danger Denial
formula: Bayesian-shrunk save rate on faced shots with xG ≥ 0.30.

name: Shot-Stopping Reliability
formula: Inverse of match-to-match std dev of GPAE per 90 (consistency, not just magnitude).

name: Claiming & Command of the Box
formula: Bayesian-shrunk (claims+punches+smothers) rate per cross faced into the box.

name: Distribution Involvement
formula: Total passes attempted per 90 (build-up outlet volume).

name: Progressive Distribution Value
formula: xT generated from the keeper's own passing, per 90.

name: Error / Risk Cost
formula: 2×(typeId-51 error events per 90) + (turnovers on own passes per 90), inverted.

name: Penalty Save Ability
formula: Bayesian-shrunk penalty save rate (prior weight 8 penalties).

name: Availability / Durability
formula: Minutes played ÷ team's total possible minutes this season.
